creator: andreast@FreeBSD.org
text:
The attached patch makes python26 build on powerpc.
Additionally we need a fix for mtree, see below.

[andreast@wolfram] /usr/ports/lang/python26/> diff -u pkg-plist.orig 
pkg-plist
--- pkg-plist.orig	2010-08-11 22:50:17.000000000 +0200
+++ pkg-plist	2010-08-11 22:50:32.000000000 +0200
@@ -827,7 +827,7 @@
  %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/fcntl.so
  %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/future_builtins.so
  %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/grp.so
-%%X86_ONLY%%%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/imageop.so
+%%32BIT_ONLY%%%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/imageop.so
  %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/itertools.so
  %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/math.so
  %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/lib-dynload/mmap.so

Fix: Attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
